name: The Art of Letting Go
description:
When Olivia signs up for a life-saving surgery that will erase every memory - including the man who broke her heart - she’s finally ready to walk away from her painful marriage.
But with 14 days left on the clock, her cold, distant husband realizes too late what he’s about to lose.

name: Never Let You Go
description: An accident caused Beth and Eric, who were meant to be married, to become estranged. Misguided by his mother, Eric mistakenly believed that Beth had abandoned him, leading him to harbor resentment towards her. Six years later, when Beth returned to her home country with her daughter, Nina, for medical treatment, she unexpectedly encountered Eric again. What sparks will fly between them this time? In this tumultuous journey filled with love and conflict, will they be able to rediscover their true feelings and find a way back to each other?

name: When Love Is The Answer
description: After a stillbirth, Amelia was set up and had a night with the wealthy Caleb. An unexpected pregnancy led him to take her in. He suspected a scheme, and she endured out of necessity. As her manipulative ex-husband stirred conflict, Caleb uncovered the truth. Would they remain polite or yield to their hearts? Wounded by past love, Amelia hesitated to trust his sincerity.

name: Daddy's Best Friend Made Me His Billion Dollar Wife
description: Madalyn's boyfriend cheated on her. She got drunk and ended up sleeping with Nicolas, who was thirteen years older than her. As a result, they entered into matrimony. Madalyn believed it to be a loveless marriage, however, she had unknowingly fallen into the trap set with Nicolas's love. He was waiting for her to love him back.

name: From Scapegoat to Sweetheart: A Revenge Plan
description: Having borne the brunt of her sister's schemes and become the family's scapegoat, Stella nurtured one desperate wish to break free: to marry her parents' sworn enemy. When her wish startlingly materialized, she discovered a perverse pleasure in the role of the enemy's wife—a role far more fulfilling than that of a daughter. Empowered by a husband who avenges every wrong against her, she now lives a life of triumph and rising fortune.

name: The Stock Queen Returns
description: Louise, the 'never-wrong' stock market queen of Alice Group, secretly married David and helped his company go public. But when the scheming Carol interfered, Louise vowed revenge—divorcing David and revealing her true identity. Then came Simon, her unexpected light. In the end, her choice was...?"

name: Leaving With The Ashes
description: lvy shed her military uniform and settled into a domestic routine, diligently contributing to his company. Yet all she received in return were his dismissive words and the mockery of his friends. Little did they know that she had once been an elite special forces operative, flying fighter jets on missions every day. Fluent in five languages, she had been the valedictorian of a top science academy and led a team of top-tier hackers. Disillusioned and heartbroken, she resolutely filed for divorce, carrying her parents' ashes as she headed to the airport.

name: My Wedding Day Fortune
description:
Rachel’s wedding was meant to be the happiest day of her life, but it became her worst nightmare. On the morning of the ceremony, she discovered her fiancé, Daniel Lee, had been having an affair with her sister, Sophie Doran. The betrayal left her shattered.
Turning to her parents for support, Rachel was hit with an even harsher truth: she wasn’t their biological daughter but had been adopted to provide a compatible blood donor for Sophie’s illness. When Rachel’s world crumbled, her adoptive parents coldly disowned her, leaving her completely alone.
In her darkest hour, Rachel was found by her biological mother, Mia Grant, who revealed Rachel’s true identity: she was the long-lost daughter of Lucas Grant, a powerful billionaire in Los Angeles. The revelation gave Rachel a chance to start over, but Sophie and the Doran family wouldn’t let her go quietly.
Relentless in their attempts to humiliate and undermine her, the Dorans pushed Rachel too far. Finally, she decided enough was enough and vowed to fight back, reclaiming control of her life.

name: The Surrender To The Love That Was Always There
description: Only in death did Bethany realize her marriage had been Saul's cruel revenge scheme. He'd always loved his first love. Reborn back in school days, she immediately reclaimed her billionaire heiress status and married her childhood sweetheart heir. But then Saul showed up at her door red-eyed and unraveled, demanding "Bethany, didn't you swear you'd only ever love me?"

name: Falling For My Ex's General Dad
description: This story follows a naive yet kind-hearted American girl who travels to Russia in search of her husband, only to discover he is a notorious playboy. Stranded and endangered in a foreign land, she is rescued by a Russian general. Through their growing interactions, her fear of him gradually transforms into admiration and affection. However, in an unexpected twist, the Russian general she falls for turns out to be the father of her deceitful ex-husband. Where will their forbidden love lead them.

name: Fake Wife, True Love
description: Kinsley entered into an arranged marriage in place of her twin sister to cover their father's medical expenses. During that year, she worked hard to be a good wife, ensuring no one suspected her true identity. A year later, her sister returned and demanded to reclaim her identity. After her sister took over the family and husband, Kinsley had no choice but to step back. However, the seemingly indifferent husband quickly noticed that his wife had been replaced and searched for her like crazy.

name: Ex-Husband Step Aside, Lady Boss Returns
description: Callie was married to Andrew for three years, during which she played the dutifulwife, attending to his every need, yet failed to warm his heart.When Andrew'sidealized first love falsely accused Callie, he even demanded she donate a kidney tocompensate his beloved.Realizing the futility, Callie handed him the divorce papers,freeing him to be with his first love,Andrew thinks that Callie can't even live withouthim.However, the very next day, Callie made headlines as the heiress of theprestigious Jon family,When they met again after the divorce, Andrew was filled withregret as he looked at the radiant Callie.lt was then that he realized that he hadfallen in love with her, But will he ever be able to get her back?

name: CEO's Ex-Wife Is The Billionaire Heiress
description:
Amanda Burton, a wealthy heiress, plans to reveal her pregnancy and true identity through a billion-dollar project. But during a checkup, she discovers her husband, Michael Walsh, with another woman, Caitlyn Russell—who is pregnant with his child. Devastated, Amanda returns home, only to face more hostility from her mother-in-law, leading her to file for divorce.
Tragedy strikes when her mother-in-law’s push causes Amanda to miscarry, and tensions between the families rise. Heartbroken, Amanda decides to start fresh, focusing on her career and becoming a true lady boss. Meanwhile, Michael realizes too late how much he loves her. Can they rebuild their broken trust, or is it already too late?

name: Frozen Wife, Unfrozen Revenge
description: Audrey was the lead researcher on a cryogenics experiment, but her project lacked enough volunteer participants. After four years of hard work and enduring her husband's betrayal, she decided to take part in the experiment herself. She was frozen for ten years and left behind a fake death certificate for her husband. When he discovered her supposed death, he was heartbroken. A decade later, when he finally found her, Audrey was very much alive and had already entered into a relationship with the person who truly loved her.

name: From Fake to Fortune
description: Landen's life was in ruins after his wife's betrayal and his father's critical illness. At rock bottom, he bonded with the 'Turn Fake into Real' system, which transformed scams and false ads into real opportunities. He used this power to change his destiny: a shady ad brought him to a CEO, amassing wealth through jade gambling, dominating business, exacting revenge, and navigating complex relationships. Landen had mastered the art of turning lies into his own truth.

name: Living My Best Life Without Them
description: In Cary's past life, he was ignored by his family and died because of Danny. Before his death, Cary felt disappointed by his family. When he opened his eyes again, he realized he had been reborn back to his birthday ten years ago. Cary was adopted by the Holt family when he was twelve years old. He thought he finally had a home, but he didn't expect that his family only cared for the other adopted son, Danny, while he only received indifference and unfair treatment. After Cary cut ties with his family, he stayed with two of his childhood friends and realized that a loving family member doesn't need to be blood-related. He used the information he learned from his past life to make money and live happily with his friends.

name: The Secret Heiress
description: Lily Wilson returned from studying abroad and joined her family company as an intern to prepare for succession. Upon entering the company, her colleagues bullied her, and her superior even pretended to be the heiress, throwing obstacles in her way. Revenge or forbearance? How will she choose?

name: I Conned a Billionaire to be My Husband
description: Amelia, a struggling sales woman, gets a visit by her estranged brother who blackmails her into a job of assuming someone else’s identity and seducing CEO Noah Greer in order to tank Greer Corp or else her mother might be killed. Under pressure, Amelia applies a job at Greer Corp and runs into Noah accidentally. However she doesn’t recognize him despite saving him years ago, while Noah vaguely remembers her by her name tag. Noah doesn’t reveal his true identity at first and the two are quickly delves into heated romance. As time goes along, Noah’s identity is revealed and threats against Amelia becomes more evident with Trevor’s never-ending pester , risking her identity being exposed as well. Will he forgive her if he finds out what she’s really up to?

name: She's Not a Delicate Heiress, She's a War Goddess
description: Abby, formerly the top commander of Ursulia, was reborn as a fragile heiress. At their first meeting, bleeding and bruised, she used god-tier skills to win Felix the racing championship before leaving coolly. When they met again at a high-society banquet, she kicked her scheming sister into a pool, stunning everyone. Anyone who wants to conquer her should first weigh their own strength carefully to see if they are qualified!

name: Mommy, I Brought You a Husband!
description: Ivy never dreamed that an unexpected encounter would leave her pregnant and vowing to find the man responsible. Five years later, as the renowned Ivy launched a city-wide search for a husband, her daughter Lexi found her biological father, Jake, in the countryside! Discovering the man from her past was a farmer, Ivy decided she would just take him as a live-in husband. But after marriage, she uncovered the shocking truth: this humble farmer's true identity was one of immense prestige and power.

name: Reborn To Let You Go
description: In her past life, Emma fell in love with Josh, her adopted uncle, with whom she shared no blood relation. When Josh was affected by a mysterious drug, Emma chose not to call his first love, Abby, and decided to help him herself. Months later, Emma found herself pregnant, and under pressure, Josh married her. However, on the day of their wedding, Abby was kidnapped and tragically killed, leading Josh to blame Emma for her death. During Emma's difficult labor, Josh was unable to save her or their unborn child. Miraculously, Emma found herself transported back in time to the moment when Josh was first affected by the mysterious drug. This time, she chose to call Abby, determined to start a different life.

name: The Code Reborn: A Family's 80-Year Wait
description: Emilia died on a mission. When she opened her eyes again, her soul had transmigrated into the 22-year-old stepdaughter of the Wallace family. Overnight, her eight-year-old son had become an eighty-year-old man, who came with two troublesome great-grandsons. The elder, a simple-minded CEO, was fooled by a gold-digger; the younger, an unambitious ruffian, was obsessed with the underground boxing scene. After reuniting with her octogenarian son, Emilia began to restore order to the family. By chance, she joined a decryption challenge and discovered the cipher on the letters was created by her long-lost, presumed-dead husband. The three generations of the family finally experienced their bittersweet reunion—eight decades later

name: The Mosaic of a Fated Love
description: After 18 years, Dorothy returned to the Gordon family only to be framed and looked down upon. Little did they know she was secretly a violin virtuoso, a top jewelry designer, and a brilliant doctor. After Shawn broke off their engagement but continued to pursue her privately, her many identities were suddenly exposed, revealing that their relationship was destined to be.

name: The Masked Diva's Secret
description: Jenna was a mysterious pop star known for her signature mask. Whenever she sang, she wore this unique mask to cover her face, leaving everyone clueless about her appearance. However, during one concert, Jenna suddenly announced her retirement from the music scene and vanished for seven full years. During that time, fans and musicians alike searched for the superstar, but to no avail. It turned out that Jenna had found the person she had been looking for all along: Hugh, the CEO of the Burton Group. After a car accident left him blind, he pushed everyone away. Jenna chose to remain silent and stay by his side. Over the years, they married and had an adorable daughter named Mia. Hard work paid off, and through Jenna's care, Hugh was finally about to remove his bandages and see again. Yet, on the day of his recovery, he rushed toward his first love, Norah, treating Jenna with hostility for Norah's sake. Jenna was struck by the realization that despite all she had given, this was the outcome she received. Determined to reclaim her life, she decided to divorce him and return to the music world with her daughter. Unbeknownst to Jenna, Hugh treated Norah so well because he mistakenly believed she was the iconic pop star. He and the icon had been childhood sweethearts, and that bond felt irreplaceable to him. Thus, for Norah, Hugh did many things that hurt Jenna. On that day, Hugh organized a grand return-to-stage event for Norah, believing she was the superstar. During the concert, however, he realized that Norah's voice was not that of the icon. At that moment, a video of Jenna singing appeared on the screen, and it dawned on Hugh that the childhood friend he had been searching for was his wife, Jenna! He hurried to find her, but by then, she had returned to her life as a superstar and would no longer give him a chance to reconcile.

name: Reuniting With An Old Flame
description:
Brenna and Kevin, were once deeply in love but tragic misunderstandings tore them apart. After their separation, Brenna moved abroad and raised their son, Lucas, on her own.
Five years later, fate brings them together once again. Kevin still has feelings for Brenna, but he believes she has married and started a family. This belief causes a mix of love, resentment, and confusion. While Kevin struggles to forgive her, he can't resist the pull she still has on him.
Brenna, under the assumption that Kevin is about to marry someone else, avoids confronting her feelings for him.
As they both navigate their tangled emotions, they begin to realize the strength of their connection and the unbreakable bond between them. In the end, they resolve their misunderstandings and reunite as a family.

name: The Last Straw: Rebellion at the Dinner Table
description: Despite his humble origins, Albert was highly capable. After marrying into a wealthy family, he was emotionally blackmailed by his wife into diligently managing her family's company. However, when he asked for permission to visit his parents, his wife not only refused but also restricted his freedom. Tragically, his parents died in a car accident while rushing to see him. After preparing the New Year's Eve feast, Albert received the devastating news. He flipped the banquet table over, declaring he would no longer endure this injustice.

name: The Unmasked Tycoon
description: Simon, as the CEO of Chuta Group, had once sacrificed his career for love when he married Sloane. However, years into their marriage, Sloane's first love, Vance, returned to the country, and the two became entangled in a long-standing affair. Even their son turned against him, treating another man as his father. Faced with a disloyal wife and an ungrateful son, Simon's patience finally wore thin. He resolved to divorce Sloane and reclaim everything he had sacrificed for her. When Simon asserted his authority as CEO and announced his decision to divorce, Sloane was overcome with deep regret.

name: Second Chance with My Secret Lover
description: Emma had been Michael's secret lover for five years. Despite her obedience and compliance during that time, she couldn't make him take her seriously. When Michael got engaged, he abandoned her. Adding to the turmoil, her doctor informed her that she had late-stage heart failure with only three months left to live. Although she wished to quietly live out the remaining days of her life, it became difficult due to four people's entanglement, including Michael's fiancée, Ashton who desired her, Mr. X who protected her, and her ex-boyfriend.

name: Fatal Sacrifice, Enduring Love
description: Nate, suffering from a terminal illness, had pushed his girlfriend Vivian away with a heavy heart to avoid burdening her. He volunteered for an experimental treatment funded by a wealthy benefactor, hoping to secure her future. Three years later, by a twist of fate, they met again. Nate, on the brink of death, consistently pushed Vivian away, despite her deep love for him. Ultimately, these two souls, cruelly manipulated by fate, overcame its harsh hold and embraced love and companionship.

name: Falling For My Husband
description: After facing betrayal from her boyfriend and being laid off from her job, Aubrey found herself in a sudden flash marriage with Axel, the CEO of Simpson Group. Initially strangers, the two gradually developed a deep bond. Despite a series of misunderstandings and challenges, they eventually opened their hearts to one another and began their life together, moving toward a blissful marriage.

name: The Mafia Boss Happenes to Be My Sex Partner
description: Fiona Shaw had been a rich heiress until three years ago, when her family went bankrupt. To repay her family's enormous debt, she focused on securing an arrangement with the Sterling family and married Henry. However, Henry was gay and deeply in love with his assistant, Louis; he had no feelings for Fiona and never touched her after their wedding night. The only reason for marrying Fiona was to satisfy his mother Elizabeth's, pressure and to produce an heir, ensuring that the family fortune remained in his hands and out of reach of his half-brother, Jeff.

name: His Pauper Princess
description: A rural migrant worker father, unable to collect his wages, was attacked by a ruthless employer and ended up in the hospital in critical condition. Determined to demand the owed money, Kathy ventured into the city and unexpectedly spent a passionate night with CEO Vincent, only to be misunderstood as having ulterior motives. Soon after, Kathy discovered she was pregnant and was evicted from the hospital for failing to pay her father's medical bills. As a result, the father and daughter were forced to live on the streets, surviving by collecting recyclables. Determined to secure a future for his unborn grandchild, the father risked his life once more to claim his wages. In a panic, Kathy rushed to save him but found herself and her father caught in a dire crisis. At that critical moment, Vincent resolved the misunderstanding and, upon learning that Kathy was carrying his child, came to their rescue just in time. The entire family embraced her with love and care.

name: Return of the secret heiress
description: Three years ago, Laura, heiress to the Lewis Group, the nation's wealthiest conglomerate, and a business legend, came to Maplewood to investigate an investment project. There, she fell head over heels for the unknown Ben Harrison. She hid her true identity, married Ben, and secretly helped his company become a rising star in Maplewood. After marriage, Laura worked as a cleaner at Sheppard Group and helped the group's CEO, Bryan Shepherd, resolve a business crisis. To express his gratitude, Bryan offered Ben, Laura's husband, a $100 million business contract. However, Laura didn't know that Ben had long despised her for being beneath him and had been cheating on her with Maplewood heiress, Amber.The $100 million contract gave Ben more reason to divorce Laura. On the very day Laura was eagerly preparing to celebrate Ben's birthday, Ben threw her a divorce agreement. Amber, on the other hand, insisted that she was the one who secured the contract for Ben, and together, they pressured Laura to sign the divorce agreement. Laura, who had thought she could escape the turmoil of the business world and live a simple life, finally got a reality check. She decided to resume her business plans and would host a large investment conference in Maplewood, announcin

name: Echoes of Our Love: Reunited.
description: Beth and Nate were once deeply in love but parted due to a misunderstanding. Beth went abroad alone and raised their child by herself. Five years later, they reunited. Nate still loved Beth intensely but mistakenly believed she had married and started a family, leaving him torn between affection and resentment, unable to fully forgive her yet drawn to her nonetheless. Beth, thinking Nate was about to marry someone else and begin a new life, avoided disrupting his peace and suppressed her own feelings for him. As they struggled with their emotions, both gradually realized the depth of their hearts and the unbreakable bond between them. In the end, they cleared the misunderstandings and reunited as a family.

name: Daddy, Mommy is Waiting for You
description: Seven years ago, ordinary girl Emily learned that her husband Vincent was actually the heir to a mafia family. Back then, Vincent had fractured his arm in a car accident and urgently needed surgery. His father laid down a condition for the treatment—Vincent must divorce Emily. Deeply in love with Emily, Vincent refused without hesitation, never expecting their conversation to be overheard by her. Unwilling to hold Vincent back, Emily chose to leave voluntarily, only to be caught in a car accident on the way. Vincent mistakenly believed Emily had died and was consumed by overwhelming grief. However, Emily not only survived but also gave birth to their daughter Lily—though she herself was left seriously ill as a result. To get treatment for her mother, Lily accidentally crossed paths with Vincent. Yet Vincent neither knew Lily was his daughter nor recognized that the mother of this "little wanderer" was the Emily he’d been yearning for day and night. Worse still, he even spoke harshly to her...

name: The Blind Prodigy's Adventure
description: The blind child Samuel, in a desperate attempt to save his gravely ill mother Tricia, unexpectedly discovered his biological father, the business mogul Nolan. After Nolan confirmed that Samuel was his child, he took him home. However, Samuel faced hostility from Rita, who teamed up with her family to undermine the Higgins family. Samuel leveraged his exceptional talent to launch a "Mystery Box" project to overcome the odds. Meanwhile, Tricia and Nolan worked through the misunderstandings that had caused their breakup, exposing Rita's malicious plot. In the end, the Higgins family overcame the challenges, Samuel's eye condition was cured, and his parents were reunited, rejuvenating the family.

name: Do Me, My Sexy Male Stripper
description: Vanessa caught her boyfriend Blaine in bed with her half-sister, so she went to a club for male escort service but ended up having a fling with Jason. Jason recognized Vanessa as the person who saved him in his childhood by her scar. Then he concealed his real identity, stayed by her side and secretly helped her out of various troubles. After all misunderstandings were clarified, they happily got together.

name: The Disowned
description: Aydan had been found by his biological parents during his teenage years, only to face disdain and harsh treatment from the Ahmed family. Wilbur, the foster son of the Ahmed family, drove without a license, causing the heir of the Wright family to become disabled and lose his memory. Aydan's mother sided with Wilbur, framing Aydan and resulting in his three-year imprisonment. During that time, Aydan endured severe abuse. Upon his release, he cut off all contact with the Ahmed family. Initially indifferent, they later sought to persuade Aydan to return after realizing Wilbur's true nature. Aydan firmly refused. His parents, convinced once again of Wilbur's innocence, supported him as he took over the Ahmed Group. Meanwhile, Aydan utilized the investment skills he had learned in prison to establish his own investment company. Wilbur, unable to manage successfully, tried to deceive Aydan into investing in his company, but Aydan exposed him publicly. The heir of the Wright family eventually regained his memory, leading to Wilbur being held accountable for his actions. Aydan's parents were left filled with deep regret.

name: Fates Rewritten
description: In her previous life, the woman had given everything to support her father and three brothers until they finally achieved success. However, when her sister suddenly returned and took all the love away from her, she felt betrayed. When she woke up again, she found herself reborn to the time when her parents were getting divorced. This time, she decided to abandon her heartless father and brothers and choose to be with her mother, who was about to marry into a wealthy family.

name: Approaching The Unapproachable
description: Vivian grew increasingly concerned about her son Neil's reluctance to marry, so she relentlessly sought a suitable match for him. Meanwhile, the Quinn family teetered on the edge of financial ruin. In a desperate gamble, Charlee's father drugged her and sold her to Vivian. No one expected, however, that Charlee would emit an intoxicating, irresistible scent, one that captivated Neil despite his usual disdain for women. Yet when he saw her weakened and vulnerable, he coldly offered her money to leave, determined to sever their unwanted connection.

name: My Father Is The Secret Tycoon
description: Oliver, the rising young entrepreneur, unexpectedly encountered his father, Vincent, who was working as a security guard at an exclusive venue. Everyone assumed that the organizers were being lenient with Vincent out of respect for Oliver. However, Vincent's behaviour left Oliver feeling mortified time and again. What others didn't know was that this dishevelled man, who seemed to disregard the basic etiquette of high society, had once been a prominent business magnate.

name: Lady shark in law
description: When her teenage daughter is publicly stripped and humiliated by a billionaire’s son at summer camp, ruthless lawyer Kaya does the unthinkable: she turns on her own client. Now hunted by corrupt elites, she uncovers a trail of murders, rigged evidence — and a shocking betrayal from someone she trusted most. Can she outsmart a system bought by blood money—or will her daughter pay the price? A legal firestorm where winning might cost everything.

name: The CEO's Wife Is A Secret Boss?!
description: Allison Burton intended to disclose her identity and pregnancy via a major project. She found her husband, Jeremy Walsh, with Melanie Russell at a prenatal checkup. After facing her mother-in-law's hostility, she decided to divorce Jeremy. Tragically, her mother-in-law caused her miscarriage. Amidst family conflicts at various events, Jeremy realized his love for Allison and pursued her. He saved her twice, getting injured, which led to their reconciliation.

name: Hate The Way I Love You
description:
Lillian and Jonathan are once a loving couple,believing they will be happy forever.However,a sudden illness shatters Lillian's dream life. To avoid being a burden to Jonathan, she heartbreakingly orchestrates an affair.
Little did she know, Jonathan is the heir to a powerful family and grows to despise Lillian completely..
A year later, Jonathan returns as a CEO with his new fiancee, Ashley, repeatedly hurting Lillian.
As Jonathan wrestles with his emotions, he discovers that Lillian is terminally ill at the time of their break up. 
Can their love be rekindled,and will they find their way back to each other?

name: Her Trap, His Downfall
description: Sheri was a well-known paparazzi specialising in uncovering scandals about the rich and famous. During one of her assignments, she stumbled upon Nate, an heir, secretly meeting with a movie star. Sheri snapped covert photos and falsely accused him of being "impotent." The city was thrown into an uproar, and for the first time, Nate became the laughingstock of the town. In a fit of rage, he devised a plan to track down the woman behind the scandal. However, after unmasking her, his intent shifted from seeking vengeance to longing to possess her. Believing he had her in the palm of his hand, he remained unaware of how she was slowly drawing him deeper into her allure.

name: Falling For The Boss
description: Five years ago, Sylvia was framed by her family and accidentally conceived Larry's child. When their son Louis was diagnosed with leukemia years later, Sylvia attempted to sell the Brown family heirloom jade pendant Larry had left her. As the Browns launched a citywide search for Louis, Sylvia joined Brown Group as Larry's secretary. Their forced proximity ignited unexpected sparks.

name: A New Life Forged in Vengeance and Love
description: In her past life, Xena was set up by a scumbag man and a vile woman, suffering eight miscarriages in two years before bleeding to death. Reborn, she married Christian, the richest man. Now, not only is she doted on by his entire family and pregnant with his child, but together, they have made her past tormentors pay a bitter price.

name: The Billionaire Escort's Secret
description: After discovering her husband Trevor’s infidelity, Joanna swiftly divorces him. Determined to inherit her family’s fortune and have a child, she seeks a top male escort to father her baby. Vincent, the CEO of Riley Group who has secretly loved Joanna for years, disguises himself as an escort and is chosen by her. During their intimate encounter, Vincent insists on wearing a mask to conceal his identity, knowing Joanna has vowed never to marry into wealth again. As Trevor continues to harass Joanna, Vincent steps in to protect her while maintaining his disguise. Eventually, Vincent’s true identity is revealed. Enraged, Trevor attempts to separate them. Upon learning the truth, Joanna decides to end things with Vincent, only to realize that he, not Trevor, was the one who saved her life at the ball.

name: His Discarded Pawn, Her Checkmate Move
description: For years, Catherine devoted her heart to Sebastian, only to be used as his pawn. He tasked her with winning Louis's affections, intending to sabotage the marriage between Louis and his true love, Olivia. When Catherine uncovered this ultimate scam, a profound disappointment led her to turn the sham into reality. She married Louis, leaving Sebastian with a regret that arrived too late to change anything.

name: Reborn At The Wedding Night
description: Kaylee, the only daughter of the wealthiest man, was reborn on her wedding night, the very moment she was humiliated by her groom and the woman he truly loved. This time, she refused the marriage and vowed revenge to reclaim everything. During this process, she found understanding and unwavering support in Prince Leo. Ultimately, she brought about the complete downfall of her enemies' family, married into the royal family, and shared a life of happiness with Leo.

name: Love For Hire: Married To A Hidden Billionaire
description: On her wedding day, Kaitlin Wilson dumped her scumbag husband, got herself another husband by providing a monthly salary of 20,000 dollars and married him hastily. She faced challenges and traps from her evil stepmother and stepsister, as well as snubs from her subordinate colleagues at work. Kaitlin resolved all the problems one by one, gradually discovering that her husband turned out to be a billionaire.

name: Secret After Secret: My Wife's Myriad Faces
description: Natalie found Dominic badly wounded in the countryside. After saving him with surgery, she left unseen. Later, a family pact forced them into a 100-day marriage. Dominic searched for his savior while falling for Natalie—yet grew suspicious as her hidden identities emerged: a brilliant surgeon, a renowned professor, and a powerful CEO, each revelation stunning him deeply.

name: Spoiling Her in Secret
description: Emily had been forced by her parents to go on a blind date. She took Bella to the meeting place, mistakenly thinking her date was Ashton, but quickly cleared up the misunderstanding. During the official date, Sebastian boasted arrogantly, which disgusted Emily. Ashton stepped in to help her, promising to marry Emily, which publicly embarrassed Sebastian. Emily planned to escape but ran into Ruby and Vincent, who were there to cause trouble.

name: She Is Not Your Fiancée
description: Elena and Charles had a childhood engagement. When Charles visit Elena. He bumped into Elena. As a result, Charles mistakenly identified Chloe as his fiancée. Charles wants to cancel the engagement because of Chloe's behavior. However, Elena's identity gradually emerges. Will Charles recognize Elena and discover that Chloe is not his real fiancée?

name: Guarding Her Secret, Winning His Heart
description: Grace, a flower shop owner, was forced into a marriage with Kevin, a billionaire who had mistaken her for his runaway fiancée. Having concealed her medical genius, she inadvertently revealed it by saving his grandmother. With Kevin's support, she fought back against her vengeful ex. As love blossomed in their contractual marriage, secrets from her past surfaced, ultimately leading them to true happiness.

name: The Day I Gave Up on My Father
description: When Hannah learned that her husband Nigel was not only wealthy but also favoring his first love and her son over their daughter Xena, she knew the marriage was over. She divorced him. Xena, however, couldn't let go and gave her father one last chance. That chance ended in final heartbreak, leading Xena to leave with Hannah. Nigel's eventual realization of his mistakes came too late. Despite his desperate desire to be a good father, Xena had made up her mind to cut him out of her life completely.

name: A BILLIONAIRE'S DOUBLE LIFE
description: "Cinderella " marries the secret billionaire CEO, what kind of love spark will be rubbed between them

name: How Much Love: Half a Lifelong Romance
description: Separated by the mother-in-law in their youth, the heroine was torn from her newborn son. She was deceived into believing he had died and her husband had moved on. 18 years later, she reunites with them but doesn't recognize her own family. After misunderstandings, the family finally comes together.

name: Fated To The Tycoon Healer
description: In an attempt to embarrass her ex-boyfriend, the woman falsely claimed that she was dating a powerful and influential figure. To her surprise, he overheard this and decided to take her home to marry her, hoping to bring good fortune to his gravely ill grandmother. Initially, they agreed to part ways once his grandmother recovered. However, as they spent time together, they fell in love. The man was even more astonished to discover that the woman was the brilliant doctor he had been searching for all along. Naturally, their relationship blossomed into a happy marriage.

name: The Gambler's Rebirth
description: Nick was framed by his family to take the blame for his adopted brother Ricky, leading to ten years in prison. There, he met Shawn, a gambling master, and became his apprentice. After his release, he took revenge on his hypocritical family, saved his childhood friend from the orphanage, and finally brought the wicked to justice.

name: Hate The Way You Lie
description:
Emily concealed her identity as a genius pilot and billionaire heiress to marry airline captain Andrew for love. After five years as a devoted housewife with a cold, distant husband, the pregnant Emily witnessed Andrew boarding a plane with his first love, Casey. When the plane crashed and Emily miscarried while crying for help, Andrew escaped with Casey, never hearing her pleas.
After losing her baby, Emily divorced Andrew and returned to her family, making her comeback as the legendary pilot M. Only then did Andrew realize he loved her and was filled with regret. The manipulative Casey spread lies about Emily, only to be exposed by Emily's family. When Andrew learned the truth about Emily's identity and miscarriage, he fell to his knees begging forgiveness...

name: My Billionaire Sugar Baby
description: She thought he was just a charming sugar baby - until he bought her company, crashed her marriage, and dropped to one knee. Now, with her life flipped upside down, she has to choose between pride, power… and the billionaire who never stopped loving her.

name: A Heart That Beats For You
description: Three years ago, Thea was rescued by Michael. She worked to support him, saved for his surgery, and fell in love. Little did she know this was just his lost bet, dating a poor girl and making her provide for him. When the truth came out, Thea ended it. Torn between pride and longing, Michael harassed her to return. Thea's adoptive brother Josh genuinely cared for her, sparking Michael's jealousy. Michael's fiancée, consumed by envy, staged a car crash to kill Thea. Both men saved her, but Josh needed a heart transplant to survive. Thea vowed to die with Josh if he didn't make it. Realizing he'd lost her forever, Michael donated his own heart to save Josh, letting it stay with Thea for life.

name: The Billionaire's Delivery Girl
description: Andrew had been lost as a child and was later adopted by his foster father, Jacob. Eight years earlier, he discovered that his biological parents were Michael and Isabella. Grateful for bringing him into the world, he decided to reconnect with his biological family. During those eight years, he dedicated himself to developing the world's most advanced 6G technology, working tirelessly day and night. However, his foster brother, Kolton, secretly stirred up trouble, exploiting trust to manipulate their parents into favoring him and believing his lies. Andrew’s two older sisters also grew resentful, constantly badmouthing him and undermining his efforts. Eventually, Kolton went so far as to claim credit for the cutting-edge 6G technology that Andrew had developed. Andrew made the painful decision to walk away from his biological family for good.

name: This Life, I Am My Own Master
description: Hannah grew up in an orphanage. After being reunited with her family, she was framed for crimes by the fake heiress, Connie, which led to her unjust death. Reborn, she no longer yearned for family affection. Instead, using her knowledge from her past life, she discovered hidden treasures at flea markets to make her first big break, diving into the business world to start her own business adventure.

name: They Cast Me Out, I Built My Life
description: Kacie, from a son-preferring rural family, met Alfred at 18. After their daughter was born, his family's persecution, which escalated to falsely accusing her child of theft, forced her to leave. She then found support in Lanny, a disabled veteran. She rose from a cast-off wife to a renowned factory director, rewriting her destiny through sheer resilience.

name: The Legal Queen's Return
description: For three years, star lawyer Bella sacrificed her career for her husband, Felix. His dedication to helping his ex-lover, Elissa, finally opened her eyes. Bella staged a stunning comeback, facing Felix in court and handing him a devastating defeat. From then on, when they met again in court, she was his opponent, no longer the shadow behind him.

name: Bully Me? No Mercy from Victoria!
description:
Victoria and Bella were originally sisters who were adopted by different families from an orphanage.Years later,Victoria,who had secretly served in the military,retired as a Navy Admiral and returned,hoping to provide a better life for her sister.However,she was shocked to Learn that her sister had been bullied by classmates and had entered a vegetative state.Enraged,
How will she retaliate against the trio of bullies?

name: Destined Love：Marry Me Again
description: On her wedding day, Sara, the bride, was left standing alone without her groom Kayden, who sent a divorce agreement instead of himself, leaving her to face a hall of guests by herself. Three years on, Sara has evolved into a gifted attorney, coinciding with Kayden's return from a prosperous business venture overseas, still bent on pursuing the divorce. As soon as he was back, Kayden was in a hurry to engage a prominent lawyer to handle his divorce, only to discover later that this lawyer was his wife, whom he had never met in person. Through their initial miscommunications, Kayden became increasingly captivated by Sara's intellect and strength, and Sara found her feelings for Kayden rekindled by his allure. Will they find their way back to each other?

name: Fated to Find You in My Blindest Moment
description: After a full recovery, Yvonne decided to feign blindness to plan a surprise proposal for her boyfriend. However, he passionately kissed her best friend right in front of her, and even boasted to his brothers about using a stand-in to keep her occupied while he continued to enjoy his carefree life. Overwhelmed with heartbreak and fury, Yvonne turned and threw herself into the arms of his friend Nikolas, demanding a kiss... completely unaware that Nikolas had already been obsessively in love with her for years. In this game of love, who finally won?

name: She Chose Poor, I Chose Power
description: After her backstabbing relatives killed her, Cassie was reborn. At her parents' divorce, her sister, also reborn, chose their seemingly promising but poor father. Cassie chose her mother's new wealthy family. Now, she lives a life of ultimate luxury, adored by all, while her sister waits in vain for a success that will never come, doomed to a tragic end.

name: A Love That Hurts
description: The CEO Sean Hanson, due to his special constitution, could not live past thirty. He unexpectedly discovered that Emma, an impoverished college student, was the only woman in the world capable of saving him. In order to stay alive, Sean married Emma without asking her permission. Upon learning that Emma would be in danger after saving him, Sean, who gradually fell in love with Emma, found himself in a painful life-and-death dilemma.

name: When Love Pays The Debt
description: Three years ago, Thea was rescued by Michael. She worked to support him, saved for his surgery, and fell in love. Little did she know this was just his lost bet, dating a poor girl and making her provide for him. When the truth came out, Thea ended it. Torn between pride and longing, Michael harassed her to return. Thea's adoptive brother Josh genuinely cared for her, sparking Michael's jealousy. Michael's fiancée, consumed by envy, staged a car crash to kill Thea. Both men saved her, but Josh needed a heart transplant to survive. Thea vowed to die with Josh if he didn't make it. Realizing he'd lost her forever, Michael donated his own heart to save Josh, letting it stay with Thea for life.

name: The Delivery Man is the God of War
description: Trevor, the modern-day God of War, took on the guise of a delivery driver to pursue his cultivation. Appearing ordinary, he concealed exceptional skills. During a delivery, he rescued Stella and her friend Xena, but a misunderstanding led to a compensation claim that forced him to become the company's exclusive courier. From then on, he navigated complex relationships with multiple women while frequently getting entangled in corporate battles, underworld conflicts, and intricate schemes of fame and fortune.

name: Born from Bone Marrow, Bound by Love
description: Yvonne, the illegitimate daughter of the Yates family, was forced to break up with her boyfriend and bear a child with Trevor, her sister Scarlett's fiancé, in order to provide a bone marrow transplant for Scarlett, who was suffering from leukemia. Under intense pressure from her family, Yvonne complied with the arrangement. Though her relationship with Trevor was cold and distant at first, feelings slowly grew between them as they spent more time together. Like a wolf falling for its prey, or a lamb drawn to its hunter, their love was complicated and destined for struggle. Lost in passion and moral conflict, they now face an uncertain future.

name: The Elegant Checkmate
description: After her husband's mistress mistook her for her mother-in-law, Beth seized the chance. Playing the role, she set rules to punish the woman and laid a trap to reclaim her assets. Her plan ended with her husband and mistress publicly shamed at a wedding banquet, leaving Beth to take back everything.

name: Love Before Time Runs Out
description: Housewife Madisyn Murphy has been married to her husband Dominic Murphy for many years, enduring the favoritism of her mother-in-law and the maneuvering of her conniving sister-in-law. Striving for family peace, Madisyn has silently endured all this time. It wasn't until a doctor informed her that she only had one month left to live due to breast cancer that she decided to no longer remain silent and reclaimed her self-worth.

name: Fake It Till You Taste It
description: Daniela Barton, the granddaughter of the legendary Culinary God, left her quiet countryside to test her cooking skills in the bustling city. Initially, she was mocked as a clumsy bumpkin. Yet, with each exquisite dish that she crafted presented in front of the picky crowd, Daniela began to win over her critics. Eventually, she earned the revered title of Culinary God. On this journey, she appeared to gain not just fame, but also an unexpected true love on the horizon too...

name: Surprise Vows with My CEO Husband
description: Katherine uncovers her fiancé's infidelity on their wedding day. Subsequent challenges, including betrayal by her closest friend and overwhelming wedding debts, pave the way for an unexpected turn as an elderly man presents an opulent betrothal offering to marry Katherine.

name: Seeing But Not Knowing
description: Everyone said Prince Jared was madly in love with Rosie. He had entered monastic life for her as a boy and now abandoned it for her. Only Rosie knew the truth. He married her only to clear the way for her sister's marriage. On their wedding night, she took a magical potion that would make her appear dead in seven days, allowing her to escape and live freely under a new name. She left the divorce papers and lay in her coffin, waiting for the end. But Jared discovered too late that he had mistaken her identity all along. Rosie was the woman he had yearned for all those years. Overcome with regret, he took poison to join her in death. As fate would have it, just as their story seemed over, he found her.

name: The Captive Who Captivated
description: Everly, the heir's wife and a skilled physician, was drawn into warlord conflicts after saving a spy. Austin, a ruthless warlord, imprisoned her for information. While monitoring her, he became captivated by her charm and resolved to take her from her husband. However, she became his parents' goddaughter and even became involved with his uncle. As misunderstandings cleared, the two proud souls evolved from a relationship of forced possession to standing together as allies amidst the chaos of war, their love destined to endure.

name: Love Me Like You Do
description: Emily Grant, heiress to the powerful Grant family, marries under a false identity only to be betrayed by her husband’s affair and framed by him and his mistress. After being rescued by David, their fiery one-night bond ignites mutual attraction. As Emily divorces to reclaim her corporate throne, a shocking twist emerges: David is both her stepbrother and rival heir to the Grant fortune. Forbidden desire clashes with cutthroat ambition in a war for love and legacy......

name: The Billionaire's Chase: Baby on Board
description:
Jocelyn Webb hid her identity as a wealthy heiress and worked as a model. She secretly dated Shane Bryant, the CEO of Bryant Group, for three years. Wanting to marry him, she was rejected as rumors spread about his upcoming engagement to another woman. Devastated, Jocelyn quit and walked away.
Shane only realized his true feelings after her departure. Determined, he set out to reclaim her affections, clearing up all misunderstandings and rekindling their relationship.

name: The Dead Ex
description: Five years ago, Cathy was compelled to end her marriage with Saul to protect her family, only to receive news of his death in a plane crash on the same day. Five years later, Saul returned, having faked his death and transformed into a tycoon, seeking revenge against Cathy for the past. He coerced her into being a nanny, unaware that she had been raising their son alone all those years. Amidst Saul's relentless pursuit of revenge, he learned about Cathy's sacrifices and struggles to raise their child. Overcome with regret, he began his quest to win Cathy back. Eventually, they resolved their misunderstandings and rediscovered their love.

name: A Turbulent Love Flight
description: The legendary pilot Josiah was known for his cool and distant personality. During his university days, he had been deeply in love with Amelia, but a misunderstanding made him believe she was willingly involved with a wealthy man after he saw her in a fancy sports car. This misconception led to an angry breakup between them. Three years later, Amelia, concealing her identity as an heiress, became a Chief Purser and crossed paths with Josiah once more. Josiah, feeling wounded in pride, resorted to sarcasm and scorn, driving her to the edge. As she turned away, her childhood friend Nathan offered her gentle support. In an attempt to provoke Amelia, Josiah pretended to date Evelyn as a fake girlfriend. At a charity banquet, Josiah was shocked to discover that the so-called "sponsor" from years ago was Amelia's brother, Ryan. This revelation sent him into a spiral of regret and desperate pursuit of Amelia. Meanwhile, Evelyn fabricated a kidnapping, and in an act of protection, Josiah intervened to safeguard her. He feigned memory loss and clung to Amelia, hoping to win her back. Eventually, through genuine sincerity, he earned her forgiveness, successfully repairing their fractured relationship.

name: Six Years Retribution
description: Tessa had served time in jail for her husband, Saul, for six years. When she got out, she discovered that Saul had married her best friend, Zoe, and taken over her company. Overcome with depression, she sought help from Nathan. Together, they fought back, even facing the consequences of their actions. In the process, Tessa and Nathan became a couple and started a new life together.

name: The Genius Doctor's Rebirth
description: Dorothy, a genius physician from the 21st century, found herself transported back in time, becoming a woman deemed unattractive. After being doubly betrayed by her scummy fiancé, Crown Prince Carl, and her scheming sister, Kristine, she boldly broke off the engagement on the spot. She publicly confronted the deceitful pair and then turned to marry the powerful Ninth Prince, Ethan. The couple joined forces, and ultimately, Ethan ascended the throne as Emperor with Dorothy as his Empress. They remained devoted solely to each other for life.

name: The Prisoner of a Past Love
description: Jenna was sent to prison. Her lover, Alfred, waited at the prison gate, only to be told she had been released long ago. They met again seven years later during her job interview. He acted as if she were a stranger, his cold tone crushing her hopes. She decided to leave for good and handed in her resignation. But then, he went mad, demanding she never leave him.

name: The Price Of  My Love
description: After she was killed by the mistress of her husband, she became the daughter of a wealthy man and returned gorgeously!

name: The Villain's Rise
description: Terrence, once a pawn in the hands of the campus beauty Rosie, was cruelly betrayed by her, resulting in his family's ruin. After being reborn into the novel as the tragic villain, Terrence returned to his university years equipped with a Villain System. With the powers it bestowed, he systematically punished all those who had betrayed him. This time, he turned his attention away from Rosie and towards her close friend, Violet. His shift in affection ironically ignited a fierce desire in Rosie, and ultimately, Terrence succeeded in winning his true love.

name: The Moment We Found Us
description: After a brief encounter with Alan, Lacey pretended to be her sister Sarah to gain his favor. Six years later, Sarah had become Alan's trusted legal consultant, and the two gradually developed feelings for each other. Lacey, worried about losing her status and influence, repeatedly tried to sabotage Sarah. Fortunately, Sarah managed to resolve each situation, and eventually, the truth came to light. Alan realized that Sarah was the woman from that night, and they finally ended up together.

name: I'm Back as the Stepmother to My Ex
description: In her past life, Bella was betrayed by her fiancé and stepsister. She lost her engagement, was violated by a lowlife, and was systematically stripped of her college entrance exam scores and her future. Her life ended when she orchestrated a medical accident that took them all out together. When she opened her eyes again, she was back to her first days in the city, before she had ever met Trevor. This time, she chose to marry the man fourteen years her senior, and used her new position to drive her former fiancé out of the household.

name: My New Wife Is My Ex's Boss
description: The story began with Ryan and Madison's breakup. After being betrayed, Ryan made a remarkable comeback. Eleanor demonstrated her wisdom and resolve, while Madison's materialism led to her eventual downfall. Ryan ultimately achieved great professional success and married Eleanor.

name: Seven Years of Their Romantic Entanglement
description: When the man's family went bankrupt, the woman sacrificed her treatment to secure an investment for him. Knowing she had a fatal illness, she left him. Seven years later, they met again. He discovered their son, but she claimed the child was another man's. He believed an impostor who took credit for her sacrifice, and their misunderstandings grew until the truth was revealed, leaving him filled with immense regret.

name: A Daughter's Sacrifice, A Son's Live
description: In their youth, Jacob and Nora built a life and fortune together. Years later, Jacob favored Lydia, the mother of his illegitimate son Brody, over Nora. When Brody needed a kidney, Jacob forced his frail daughter Josie, who had a bleeding disorder, to undergo the dangerous transplant, ignoring Nora's pleas.

name: Whispers Of The Heart
description: The powerful cultivator Belen was undergoing a heavenly trial when she suddenly transmigrated into the body of a malicious side character facing divorce. Her husband Roger tried to dismiss her with a payoff. She inwardly mocked the tragic fate of Roger's family, unaware that every member could hear her thoughts. With her guidance, Roger uncovered the hidden villain and rewrote their family's doomed ending.

name: The CEO And His Runaway Girlfriend
description: Three years ago, Kacie broke up with Shawn and ended her pregnancy. Once hailed as an artistic muse, she lost her standing and was labeled as materialistic, worldly, and malicious. Three years later, they met again. Shawn was the powerful magnate who acquired her company, while she struggled as a simply saleswoman. A transfer order thrusts Kacie into the corporate headquarters, where her direct superior was the alleged girlfriend of Shawn. She had to use all her wits to navigate the precarious situation. But as Shawn got closer to her, the secret she had kept hidden for so long began to unravel. Shawn never imagined that the child he thought was lost would miraculously reappear, running to him with open arms, calling him "Daddy."

name: I Don't Want To Be Your Lover, I Want To Be Your Husband
description: Reborn with vengeance in her heart, Sadie aimed to divorce her husband and protect her family. By chance, she saved a handsome stranger who turned out to be the future emperor. When her husband schemed for power, her mother-in-law plotted to tarnish her virtue, and his mistress sought to take her place, Sadie condemned them all to ruin. Yet the man she rescued refused to leave her side, relentlessly pursuing her hand in marriage.

name: The Billionaire In Disguise
description: Thea hid her identity and married Saul. Just as she was about to tell him that she was pregnant and involved in a major project, she witnessed Saul accompanying Zoe to a prenatal checkup. Heartbroken, she returned home, only to face her mother-in-law's sharp and judgmental words, which escalated into a heated argument. Amid the conflict, Thea tragically suffered a miscarriage. Devastated both physically and emotionally, she lost all hope and asked for a divorce. After navigating a whirlwind of events, Saul came to terms with his true feelings and became determined to win Thea back. Meanwhile, Thea, having been saved by Saul's timely interventions during life-threatening situations, slowly began to heal from her pain and found it in her heart to forgive him. In the end, the two reconciled and decided to rebuild their relationship with renewed commitment.

name: Starting Anew With Daughter
description: Ryan traveled back in time three years, returned the inheritance to his biological daughter Rita. He publicly exposed his adopted daughter Selena for trying to kill him and her bullying behavior. But his wife Lily stubbornly stood by Selena. It turned out Selena was actually Lily's secret daughter with another man. Ryan cut his losses by divorcing her, took Rita with him, and married his admirer Haylee. Lily's family ignored the warnings and eventually went bankrupt after Selena drained their wealth. The fate of both families was rewritten overnight.

name: s1
description: s1
